meta.name: Three Sedimentary Layers
meta.description: Three sedimentary layers from bottom to top: limestone, sandstone, shale.

layers.name: Limestone
layers.description_source: Three sedimentary layers from bottom to top: limestone (oldest), sandstone, shale (youngest), each 1m thick.

layers.name: Sandstone
layers.description_source: Three sedimentary layers from bottom to top: limestone (oldest), sandstone, shale (youngest), each 1m thick.

layers.description_source: Three sedimentary layers from bottom to top: limestone (oldest), sandstone, shale (youngest), each 1m thick.
